mapper.select: SELECT `id`, `region_id`, `name`, `cover_img`,`subtitle`, `address`, `score`, `created_at` FROM `scenics` ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM `scenics` WHERE `region_id` = #{regionId} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC
SELECT * FROM `scenics` WHERE `level` = #{level} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC
SELECT s.*, si.image_url FROM scenics s LEFT JOIN scenic_images si ON s.id = si.scenic_id WHERE s.id = #{id} ORDER BY si.id ASC
SELECT s.*, r.name AS regionName FROM scenics s LEFT JOIN regions r ON s.region_id = r.id
mapper.update: UPDATE `scenics` SET `name` = #{name}, `subtitle` = #{subtitle}, `region_id` = #{regionId}, `address` = #{address}, `level` = #{level}, `price` = #{price}, `open_time` = #{openTime}, `description` = #{description}, `cover_img` = #{coverImg} -- 景点图片字段 WHERE `id` = #{id}; -- 这里替换为要编辑的景点ID

UPDATE scenics s SET like_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 1 AND l.target_id = s.id ), collect_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 1 AND c.target_id = s.id ), comment_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 1 AND cm.target_id = s.id AND cm.status = 1 ) WHERE s.id = #{id}
